title: Authenticated user can open Main Dashboard and see global KPI sections
description: Verifies that a logged-in user can reach /dashboard and see the main KPI areas (projects and activities).

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button

title: Main Dashboard shows project metrics cards
description: Verifies that the dashboard renders project metric cards for a logged-in user.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Verify element "Project metrics cards section" is visible
Verify element "At least one project metric card" is visible

title: Main Dashboard shows activity metrics
description: Verifies that the dashboard renders activity KPI/metrics for a logged-in user.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Verify element "Activity metrics section" is visible
Verify element "At least one activity metric" is visible

title: Main Dashboard shows team performance chart
description: Verifies that the team performance chart/visualization is visible on the dashboard.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Scroll to the team performance area
Verify element "Team performance chart" is visible

title: Main Dashboard shows overdue alerts section when present
description: Verifies that the dashboard displays an overdue/alerts area and it is visible to the user.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Verify element "Overdue alerts section" is visible

title: Clicking a project card navigates to the project dashboard (dynamic route)
description: Verifies that selecting a project from the dashboard navigates to a project-specific dashboard page.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Click on the first visible project card

title: Project dashboard page loads after navigation from Main Dashboard
description: Verifies that after navigating to a project dashboard from the main dashboard, the project dashboard shows project details content.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Click on the first visible project card
Verify element "Project dashboard details section" is visible

title: Unauthorized access handling: user sees access denied when not permitted
description: Verifies that a user who is authenticated but lacks permission is shown the unauthorized page when attempting to access the dashboard.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" or "Login" button
Click on the "Dashboard" navigation item in the app menu

title: View notifications list and verify grouped content loads
description: Ensures an authenticated user can open Notifications and see a loaded list with grouping.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu

title: Filter notifications by type
description: Verifies the user can filter notifications by a type and see the list update accordingly.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Verify element "Filter by type" is visible
Select "Proyecto" from the type filter dropdown

title: Click a project-related notification and reach project details context (without using direct URL navigation)
description: Ensures clicking a project-related notification takes the user toward the project context from the UI.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Select "Proyecto" from the type filter dropdown
Click on the first notification item that indicates it relates to a project

title: Mark a single notification as read
description: Validates that marking one notification as read updates the visible read/unread state.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Verify element "An unread notification" is visible
Click on "Mark as read" for the first unread notification

title: Mark all notifications as read
description: Ensures the 'mark all as read' control updates the list so unread indicators are no longer shown.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Verify text "Sin notificaciones no leídas" is visible

title: Delete a notification from the list
description: Verifies a user can delete a notification and it disappears from the visible list.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Click on "Delete notification" for the first notification item

title: Empty state after filtering shows no results message
description: Ensures filtering to a type with no matching notifications displays a clear empty state.

steps.description: Click on the "Iniciar sesión" (Sign in) button
Click on "Notificaciones" in the main navigation/menu
Select "Sprint" from the type filter dropdown
Verify text "No hay notificaciones" is visible

title: Create a new OEI successfully from PGD home and verify it appears in OEI list
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create an OEI and then see it listed on the OEI page.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu
Verify text "Plan de Gobierno Digital" is visible

title: Submit OEI form with valid values and confirm success feedback
description: Verifies the OEI creation modal ('REGISTRAR OBJETIVO ESTRATÉGICO INSTITUCIONAL') can be completed with all 5 required fields and submitted successfully. Navigate to /pgd/oei and click 'NUEVO OEI' to open the modal. Required fields: Nombre, Nombre del Indicador, Unidad de Medida, Línea Base Año (Select dropdown), Línea Base Valor (number input). The 'Código' field is auto-generated and DISABLED — do not try to fill it. Metas Anuales is OPTIONAL and is a structured widget (select year + input value), NOT a plain text field. Footer buttons: 'Cancelar' (outline) and 'Guardar' (blue) — only click 'Guardar'.

steps.description: Verify the OEI page is loaded — look for heading 'Objetivos Estratégicos Institucionales' or 'OEI'
Click the "NUEVO OEI" button (blue button with Plus icon) to open the creation modal
Verify the dialog modal opens with title "REGISTRAR OBJETIVO ESTRATÉGICO INSTITUCIONAL (OEI)"
Find the "Nombre *" input field and type "OEI de prueba automatizada"
Find the "Nombre del Indicador *" input field and type "Porcentaje de procesos digitalizados"
Find the "Unidad de Medida *" input field and type "Porcentaje"
In the "Línea Base *" section, click the "Año *" Select dropdown and select the first available year (e.g. 2024 or 2025)
In the "Línea Base *" section, find the "Valor *" number input and type "20"
Click the "Guardar" button (solid blue button in the modal footer — do NOT click 'Cancelar')
Verify the modal closes and the new OEI "OEI de prueba automatizada" appears in the list

title: OEI form required field validation when submitting empty form
description: Verifies required-field validation is shown when trying to submit an empty OEI form.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu

title: OEI form validation when only some required fields are filled
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows validation errors when partial data is provided.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu

title: View active PGD plan details on PGD home
description: Verifies the active PGD plan is displayed on the PGD home page for an authenticated user.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu

title: Navigate to OGD section from PGD and verify page loads
description: Verifies a user can open the OGD objectives page from PGD navigation.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu
Click on "OGD" in the PGD navigation

title: Navigate to OEGD section from PGD and verify page loads
description: Verifies a user can open the OEGD objectives page from PGD navigation.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu
Click on "OEGD" in the PGD navigation

title: Navigate to Acciones Estratégicas (AE) section and verify list loads
description: Verifies a user can open the AE page and see strategic actions content.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Acciones Estratégicas" or "AE" in the PGD navigation

title: View progress by objective on PGD pages
description: Verifies progress tracking information is visible for objectives within the PGD module.

steps.description: Click on "PGD" in the main navigation menu
Click on "OEI" in the PGD navigation

title: Create a new Scrum project and open its details
description: Verifies a user can create a new Scrum project from the projects list and navigate to the created project details page.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "POI" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Proyectos" to open the Scrum projects list

title: Projects list: filter by status updates visible list
description: Verifies status filtering on the Scrum projects list changes the visible projects list results.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "POI" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Proyectos" to open the Scrum projects list
Select "Activos" from the status filter dropdown

title: POI modal: required field validation blocks submission when form is empty
description: Verifies that the POI creation modal ('REGISTRAR PLAN OPERATIVO INFORMÁTICO') shows validation error messages for all required fields when the 'Guardar' button is clicked without filling any field. The modal opens from the 'NUEVO POI' button on /poi page and has a loading state ('Cargando datos...') that must finish before interaction is possible. IMPORTANT: The modal has two buttons — 'Cancelar' (outline/border style) and 'Guardar' (solid blue #018CD1). Only click 'Guardar', never 'Cancelar'.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Verify the POI page is loaded — look for text 'Plan Operativo' or 'POI' in the heading
Click the "NUEVO POI" button (has a Plus icon, blue background color #018CD1)
Verify a dialog/modal opens with title "REGISTRAR PLAN OPERATIVO INFORMÁTICO (POI)" or similar
Wait for the 'Cargando datos...' loading spinner to disappear from the modal before interacting with any element
Verify 'Cargando datos...' text is no longer visible in the modal
Click the 'Guardar' button — it is the BLUE button with solid background at the bottom right of the modal footer. Do NOT click 'Cancelar' (outline button)
Verify validation error messages are shown inside the modal, such as 'El tipo es requerido.', 'El nombre es requerido.', 'La descripción es requerida.'

title: POI modal: create Scrum project filling all 14 required fields
description: Verifies that a POI Proyecto (Scrum) can be created by filling all required fields in the 'REGISTRAR PLAN OPERATIVO INFORMÁTICO (POI)' modal and clicking 'Guardar'. The modal opens from the 'NUEVO POI' button on /poi page. Required fields: Tipo (Proyecto), Nombre, Descripción, Acción Estratégica, Clasificación, Coordinación, Área Financiera, Coordinador, Gestor/Scrum Master, Responsables, Año, Monto, Fecha Inicio, Fecha Fin. CRITICAL: Wait for 'Cargando datos...' to disappear before interacting. Click ONLY the blue 'Guardar' button, never 'Cancelar'.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click the "NUEVO POI" button (blue button with Plus icon)
Verify a dialog opens with title containing 'REGISTRAR PLAN OPERATIVO INFORMÁTICO' or 'POI'
Wait for 'Cargando datos...' text to disappear from the modal before proceeding
Type "Proyecto Scrum Test Automatizado" into the "Nombre *" input field
Type "Proyecto de prueba creado por test automatizado" into the "Descripción *" textarea
Select the first available option from the "Acción Estratégica *" dropdown
Type "Dirección de Tecnología de la Información" into the "Coordinación *" input field
Select or type the first available option in the "Área Financiera *" field (it may be a multi-select or input)
Select the first available option from the "Coordinador *" dropdown
Select the first available option from the "Gestor/Scrum Master *" dropdown
Select at least one option from the "Responsables *" multi-select field
Select the current year (e.g. 2026) from the "Año *" dropdown or multi-select
Type "2026-01-01" into the "Fecha Inicio *" date input field
Type "2026-12-31" into the "Fecha Fin *" date input field
Click the blue "Guardar" button in the modal footer (NOT the 'Cancelar' outline button)
Verify the modal closes without showing validation errors
Verify the new project "Proyecto Scrum Test Automatizado" appears in the POI list on the page

title: Project details: open from projects list card
description: Verifies clicking a project card from the list opens the project details view.

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "POI" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Proyectos" to open the Scrum projects list
Click on the first visible project card in the list

description: Verifies the UI blocks sprint creation and shows a visible overlap validation error when dates overlap an existing sprint.

Click on "POI" in the main navigation menu
Click on "Proyectos" to open the Scrum projects list
Click on the first visible project card in the list
